scripts.migrate:local: pnpm exec wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --local --config worker/wrangler.toml
scripts.migrate:staging: pnpm exec wrangler d1 migrations apply logseq-sync-graph-meta-staging --env staging --remote --config worker/wrangler.toml
scripts.migrate:prod: pnpm exec wrangler d1 migrations apply logseq-sync-graphs-prod --env prod --remote --config worker/wrangler.toml
scripts.deploy-prod: export SENTRY_RELEASE=$(git rev-parse HEAD) && pnpm clean && pnpm release && pnpm sentry:sourcemaps && pnpm exec wrangler deploy --config worker/wrangler.toml --env prod
scripts.deploy-staging: export SENTRY_RELEASE=$(git rev-parse HEAD) && pnpm clean && pnpm release && pnpm sentry:sourcemaps && pnpm exec wrangler deploy --config worker/wrangler.toml --env staging
